description: Example devnet configuration - Copy to devnet-config.json and fill in your private keys
notes: NEVER COMMIT THIS FILE WITH REAL PRIVATE KEYS
Copy this file to devnet-config.json and add your keys
Use scripts/setup-static-devnet-wallets.ps1 to generate this file
Or set DEVNET_SENDER_KEY, DEVNET_RECEIVER_KEY, etc. environment variables
